query: SELECT order_number, scheduled_for, created_at, FROM_UNIXTIME(scheduled_for/1000) as scheduled_time_readable FROM orders WHERE created_at > '2026-02-03 14:00:00' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2acBjedGBUZUvzs.4f77da611348 --database 6g8xxhsNMKiXF83cS8YGfP --execute SELECT order_number, scheduled_for, created_at, FROM_UNIXTIME(scheduled_for/1000) as scheduled_time_readable FROM orders WHERE created_at > '2026-02-03 14:00:00' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
